allBooks.title: The Lighthouse Keeper
allBooks.author: Mara Ellison
allBooks.description: A widowed keeper and a runaway girl share a winter on a remote island, learning what it means to keep a light burning for someone else.

allBooks.title: Ashes in the Archive
allBooks.author: J.P. Crane
allBooks.description: When an archivist vanishes under suspicious circumstances, a trail of fire-damaged records points to a secret dating back to the town's founding.

allBooks.title: Orbital Driftwood
allBooks.author: Nadia Vance
allBooks.description: Stranded on a decommissioned space station, two engineers find a mysterious signal that challenges everything humanity knows about space travel.

allBooks.title: The Quiet Economy
allBooks.author: Daniel Roth
allBooks.description: An insightful exploration of modern micro-economies and how small-scale community trade is changing the global financial landscape.

allBooks.title: Salt & Other Small Gods
allBooks.author: Imani Okafor
allBooks.description: A profound collection of modern poetry dealing with roots, ancestry, migration, and the healing power of memory and the sea.

allBooks.title: Pip and the Paper Moon
allBooks.author: Luna Hart
allBooks.description: Follow Pip the mouse as he embarks on an imaginative nighttime adventure to catch a falling star using a homemade paper balloon.

allBooks.title: A House of Borrowed Light
allBooks.author: Sofia Marchetti
allBooks.description: A historical drama set in a remote village, tracing the lives of three generations of women as they seek independence during a time of immense social change.

allBooks.title: Hands in the Soil
allBooks.author: Greta Lindqvist
allBooks.description: The inspiring life story of an pioneering botanist who traveled the world cataloging rare alpine flora while breaking barriers for women in science.

allBooks.title: The Saltmarsh Murders
allBooks.author: Edmund Pryce
allBooks.description: A chilling classic noir mystery that takes place on the foggy marshes of eastern England, where a series of old family secrets resurface.

allBooks.title: Threads of the Void
allBooks.author: Kai Tanaka
allBooks.description: An epic cyberpunk story exploring AI consciousness and human modification in a city built entirely on reclaimed sea platforms.

allBooks.title: The Cartographer's Daughter
allBooks.author: Lena Hartwell
allBooks.description: Armed with only her father's unfinished maps, a young cartographer sets out to find an uncharted island rumored to hold ancient relics.

allBooks.title: What the River Knows
allBooks.author: Theo Abboud
allBooks.description: When a local bridge collapse reveals artifacts from a forgotten era, a young archaeologist finds herself entangled in a web of historical deceit.

allBooks.title: Ink & Consequence
allBooks.author: Marcus Osei
allBooks.description: An intimate, beautifully written story about the friendship between a retired printing press operator and a young aspiring writer.

allBooks.title: The Glass Meridian
allBooks.author: Priya Nair
allBooks.description: A sweeping science fiction tale concerning a climate scientist who discovers a rift in time along the equator, and must fight to save the future.

allBooks.title: Everything the River Took
allBooks.author: Ada Fenwick
allBooks.description: A gripping story of family secrets, lost heritage, and a mysterious river that knows the truth, set against the backdrop of rural England.
